title: verbascum × pseudomaurum
intro: Verbascum × pseudomaurum, a hybrid species of the Verbascum genus, is a flowering plant known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. This plant is traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × pseudomaurum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
